title: Actor Resource Definition (v1.10.0)
description: Defines an entity client resource definition document with format_version 1.10.0.

format_version.title: Format Version
format_version.description: Specifies the format version of this client entity definition. Determines which features and syntax are available.

minecraft:client_entity.title: Client Entity
minecraft:client_entity.description: Defines the client-side rendering properties for an entity, including textures, geometry, animations, and render controllers.

description.title: Description
description.description: Contains all the visual definition properties for this entity, including identifier, textures, geometry, materials, animations, and spawn egg settings.

defaultSnippets.label: Description

defaultSnippets.label: Client Entity
defaultSnippets.description: Defines the client-side rendering properties for an entity, including textures, geometry, animations, and render controllers.

description.title: Description
description.description:
Properties:
• identifier (string)
• min_engine_version
• materials (object)
• textures (object)
• geometry (object)
• queryable_geometry (string)
• spawn_egg ({ texture, base_color, overlay_color, ... })
• scripts ({ variables, initialize, pre_animation, ... })
• ... and 9 more properties
